display.purpose: Hero headlines and page titles. Playfair Display SemiBold 600, fluid clamp.

h3.purpose: Card titles and sub-sections. Playfair Display Regular 400.

h4.purpose: Property names and lead text. Playfair Display Regular 400.

body.purpose: Long-form copy and inputs. Libre Franklin Light 300, line-height 1.7.

ui.purpose: Buttons, nav links, labels, prices. Libre Franklin Regular 400.

small.purpose: Metadata, captions, fine print. Libre Franklin Regular 400.

overline.purpose: Uppercase labels and section markers. Libre Franklin Medium 500, tracked 0.12em.

shadows.name: none-at-rest
shadows.purpose: Surfaces are flat at rest. Definition comes from the 1px Stone Border, never a shadow.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Subtle lift on interactive cards during hover only, paired with translateY(-6px).

motion.name: ease
motion.purpose: Custom ease-out: starts fast, settles gently. Used for all transitions.

motion.name: duration-hover
motion.purpose: Color changes, border reveals, arrow slides.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The default call to action. Square corners, 1px border, deep green fill that darkens to charcoal on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn { font-family: var(--sans); font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide); padding: 0.875rem 2rem; border-radius: 0; border: 1px solid; cursor: pointer; transition: background var(--duration-hover) var(--ease), color var(--duration-hover) var(--ease), border-color var(--duration-hover) var(--ease); } .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--green); color: var(--white); border-color: var(--green); } .ds-btn-primary:hover, .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { background: var(--charcoal); border-color: var(--charcoal); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with a green hairline; fills green on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: var(--green); border: 1px solid var(--green); font-family: var(--sans); font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide); padding: 0.875rem 2rem; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background var(--duration-hover) var(--ease), color var(--duration-hover) var(--ease); } .ds-btn-outline:hover, .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { background: var(--green); color: var(--white); }

components.name: Gold Button
components.description: Emphasis action, used sparingly. Sand gold fill with green text; inverts to green on hover. The live primary CTA on dark green sections (EnquiryCta).
components.css: .ds-btn-gold { background: var(--gold); color: var(--green); border: 1px solid var(--gold); font-family: var(--sans); font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide); padding: 0.875rem 2rem; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background var(--duration-hover) var(--ease), color var(--duration-hover) var(--ease), border-color var(--duration-hover) var(--ease); } .ds-btn-gold:hover, .ds-btn-gold:focus-visible { background: var(--green); color: var(--white); border-color: var(--green); }

components.name: Text Link
components.description: Inline editorial link. Underline appears on hover only; the arrow slides right and the color shifts from green to gold.
components.html: Read the area guide →
components.css: .ds-link { font-family: var(--sans); font-size: var(--text-ui); color: var(--green); text-decoration: none; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; transition: color var(--duration-hover) var(--ease); } .ds-link:hover, .ds-link:focus-visible { color: var(--gold); text-decoration: underline; text-underline-offset: 3px; } .ds-link__arrow { transition: transform var(--duration-hover) var(--ease); } .ds-link:hover .ds-link__arrow, .ds-link:focus-visible .ds-link__arrow { transform: translateX(3px); }

components.name: Property Card
components.description: Signature listing card. White surface, 1px Stone Border, no shadow at rest. Gold uppercase location overline, Playfair title, tabular-num price separated by a hairline.
components.html:
Sotogrande, Andalucia

Fairway villa with sea views

4 bed · 4 bath

€2,450,000
components.css: .ds-property-card { display: block; border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--white); color: inherit; text-decoration: none; transition: box-shadow var(--duration-lift) var(--ease), transform var(--duration-lift) var(--ease); } .ds-property-card:hover, .ds-property-card:focus-visible { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(31, 61, 52, 0.12); } .ds-property-card__image { display: block; width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 3 / 2; object-fit: cover; } .ds-property-card__body { padding: var(--space-lg); } .ds-property-card__location { margin: 0 0 var(--space-sm); font-family: var(--sans); font-size: var(--text-overline); font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: var(--tracking-overline); text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); } .ds-property-card__title { margin: 0; font-family: var(--serif); font-size: var(--text-h4); font-weight: 400; color: var(--green); line-height: 1.3; } .ds-property-card:hover .ds-property-card__title { color: var(--green); } .ds-property-card__specs { margin: var(--space-sm) 0 0; color: var(--muted); font-family: var(--sans); font-size: var(--text-ui); } .ds-property-card__price { margin: var(--space-md) 0 0; padding-top: var(--space-md); border-top: 1px solid var(--border); font-family: var(--sans); font-size: var(--text-ui); color: var(--charcoal); font-feature-settings: 'tnum'; }

components.name: Bottom-Border Input
components.description: Form field as a considered questionnaire line, not a box. No background, no border except a 1px Stone Border underline that turns green on focus.
components.css: .ds-field { display: block; } .ds-field__label { display: block; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; font-family: var(--sans); font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 400; color: var(--charcoal); } .ds-field__input { width: 100%; font-family: var(--sans); font-size: var(--text-body); font-weight: 300; color: var(--charcoal); background: transparent; border: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 0; padding: 0.875rem 0; transition: border-color var(--duration-hover) var(--ease); } .ds-field__input::placeholder { color: var(--muted); } .ds-field__input:focus { outline: none; border-bottom-color: var(--green); }

components.name: Site Navigation
components.description: Fixed top bar on deep green. Logo left, uppercase tracked links right that shift to gold on hover.
components.html:
• Spain
  • Portugal
  • About
components.css: .ds-site-nav { height: var(--nav-height); background: var(--green); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 2.5rem; } .ds-site-nav__logo { width: 140px; flex-shrink: 0; line-height: 0; } .ds-site-nav__logo img { width: 100%; height: auto; } .ds-site-nav__menu { display: flex; align-items: center; margin-left: auto; list-style: none; padding: 0; } .ds-site-nav__link { font-family: var(--sans); font-size: var(--text-ui); font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide); text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); padding: 0 1.25rem; height: var(--nav-height); display: flex; align-items: center; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; transition: color var(--duration-hover) var(--ease); } .ds-site-nav__link:hover, .ds-site-nav__link:focus-visible { color: var(--gold); }

narrative.overview: Golf Homes International is a curated portfolio of residential property tied to world-class golf, presented as an editorial marketing site rather than a search engine. The experience is calm, exclusive, and authoritative: walking into a quiet room in a private club where a leather portfolio is placed in front of you, everything considered, nothing competing for attention. Luxury is communicated by what is absent. Generous negative space, considered typography, and photography that carries the emotional weight. The site explicitly rejects the noise of property portals (Rightmove, Idealista, Zillow), the stock-photo gold-gradient cliches of generic luxury real estate, cold corporate formality, and parallax-overload motion for its own sake.
keyCharacteristics: Zero border-radius on every element (square corners are a deliberate brand signal)
No drop shadows at rest; definition comes from 1px Stone Border hairlines
Photography carries the emotional weight; UI stays out of the way
Restrained palette: green and linen with gold as the single accent
Playfair Display (600/400) over Libre Franklin (300/400/500) for editorial weight contrast

rules.name: The Single Accent Rule
rules.body: Sand Gold is the only accent. It is reserved for interactive states, overlines, and hover underlines, used sparingly. Everything else is green, linen, charcoal, and white.

rules.name: The Square Corner Rule
rules.body: Border-radius is 0 everywhere, no exceptions. Most luxury real estate sites round their corners; this one does not. The square corner is the face of the brand.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. There are no shadows except as a response to state (a subtle lift on card hover). Cards are defined by their 1px Stone Border, not by elevation.

rules.name: The Considered Questionnaire Rule
rules.body: Form inputs are bottom-border only: no boxes, no fills. A form should feel like a considered questionnaire, not a web form.

dos: Do keep border-radius at 0 on every element, including buttons, cards, inputs, and images.
Do define cards and panels with a single 1px Stone Border (#E2DED5), never a thicker border or a resting shadow.
Do reserve Sand Gold (#D6C3A3) for accents only: overlines, hover states, and moments that earn emphasis.
Do let photography carry the emotional weight and keep UI quiet around it.
Do use generous negative space; nothing should look crowded.
Do bump body weight to 350 with extra line-height and tracking when text sits on dark green surfaces.
donts: Don't build like a property portal (Rightmove, Idealista, Zillow): no clutter, no noise, no transactional density.
Don't reach for generic luxury real estate cliches: stock photography, gold gradients, or 'exclusive lifestyle' in every headline.
Don't feel corporate, cold, or overly formal; warmth and human authority over institutional distance.
Don't add flashy motion: no parallax overload, no autoplay video, no movement for movement's sake. Motion exists only to provide feedback or signal state changes.
Don't use a side-stripe border-left/right greater than 1px as a colored accent.
Don't introduce gradient text, glassmorphism, or per-section uppercase tracked eyebrows.
